entries.definition:
ṭ-f-ʾ (of fire) to become extinguished. Of this root, the form أَطْفَأ ʾaṭfaʾa occurs three times in the Qurʾan.
أَطْفَأ ʾaṭfaʾa [v. IV, trans.] 1 to extinguish, to put out (5:64) كُلَّمَا أَوْقَدُوا نَارًا لِلْحَرْبِ أَطْفَأَهَا اللَّهُ whenever they kindle a fire of war, God puts it out 2 to snuff out, to blow out (9:32) يُرِيدُونَ أَنْ يُطْفِئُوا نُورَ اللَّهِ بِأَفْوَاهِهِمْ they want to blow out the light of God by what they say [lit. with their mouths].
entries.definition_english:
ṭ-f-ʾ (of fire) to become extinguished. Of this root, the form أَطْفَأ ʾaṭfaʾa occurs three times in the Qurʾan.
أَطْفَأ ʾaṭfaʾa [v. IV, trans.] 1 to extinguish, to put out (5:64) كُلَّمَا أَوْقَدُوا نَارًا لِلْحَرْبِ أَطْفَأَهَا اللَّهُ whenever they kindle a fire of war, God puts it out 2 to snuff out, to blow out (9:32) يُرِيدُونَ أَنْ يُطْفِئُوا نُورَ اللَّهِ بِأَفْوَاهِهِمْ they want to blow out the light of God by what they say [lit. with their mouths].
